sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Reliance Global Group, Inc. Closes Public Offering of 7.4 Million Shares with Gross Proceeds of Approximately $2 Million
feed.summary: Reliance Global Group, Inc. announced the closing of a public offering of 7,407,408 shares of common stock, along with warrants, raising approximately $2 million in gross proceeds. The company plans to use these funds for working capital, mergers and acquisitions, and general corporate purposes. H.C. Wainwright & Co. acted as the exclusive placement agent for the offering, which involved shares priced at $0.27 each.

feed.title: AI hiring fraud pushes $6B retailer to adopt selfie ID checks
feed.summary: authID and MajorKey have partnered with a global personal-care retailer, with over $6 billion in annual sales, to implement high-assurance identity verification for employees and contractors. This measure aims to combat rising hiring fraud, including AI-generated deepfakes and synthetic identities, especially for offshore and third-party users with privileged access. The solution, IDProof+ powered by authID Proof, integrates with Microsoft Entra and CyberArk, generating cryptographic keys instead of storing biometric data to preserve privacy and ensure compliance.

feed.title: zSpace receives $3 million strategic investment from Planet One Education By Investing.com
feed.summary: zSpace, Inc. (NASDAQ:ZSPC), an augmented and virtual reality solutions provider for education, has secured a $3 million strategic investment from Planet One Education. This investment, consisting of convertible preferred stock and warrants, aims to fortify zSpace's financial standing and accelerate its international expansion, particularly into growth markets outside the United States. The deal also opens doors for strategic collaborations to enhance STEM and vocational training initiatives globally.

feed.title: zSpace Raises Preferred Equity, Reshapes Capital Structure
feed.summary: zSpace, Inc. (ZSPC) has secured an initial $3 million institutional investment through a securities purchase agreement for Series P Convertible Preferred Stock and warrants. The new Series P preferred shares feature an 18% cumulative, paid-in-kind dividend, strong protections, and a structured conversion feature into common stock, significantly reshaping the company's capital structure. Despite this financing, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, Spark, rates ZSPC as Neutral due to weak financial performance and technical pressures, although improvements in software/services mix and gross margins were noted.

feed.title: SSR Mining Announces Results of the Hod Maden Technical Report Summary With $1.66B NPV5% and 39% IRR
feed.summary: SSR Mining Inc. released its 2025 Hod Maden Technical Report Summary, highlighting the Hod Maden project in Türkiye as one of the highest-returning undeveloped copper-gold projects globally. The report estimates an after-tax NPV5% of $1.66 billion and an IRR of 39% at consensus metal prices, increasing to $2.97 billion with a 58% IRR at recent spot prices. The project is projected to produce 1.6 million ounces of gold and 209 million pounds of copper over its mine life, with an estimated All-in Sustaining Cost (AISC) of $790 per ounce of payable gold.

feed.title: SSR Mining Announces Results of the Hod Maden Technical Report Summary With $1.66B NPV5% and 39% IRR
feed.summary: SSR Mining Inc. has announced the completion of a Technical Report Summary (TRS) for its Hod Maden project in Türkiye. The 2025 Hod Maden TRS highlights a significant Net Present Value (NPV5%) of $1.66 billion and an impressive Internal Rate of Return (IRR) of 39%, indicating strong financial viability for the project. These results were presented on a 100% basis in U.S. dollars.

feed.title: Gold and Silver Surge: TRX, PNPNF, BMXI, DTREF, AMLM Undervalued Miners Emerge
feed.summary: The article discusses the current surge in gold and silver prices, driven by inflation hedging, geopolitical risks, and central bank accumulation, which is drawing investor interest towards precious metals and critical minerals. It highlights TRX Gold Corporation (TRX) as a profitable gold producer benefiting from these high prices and introduces four microcap companies – Power Metallic Mines Inc. (PNPNF), Dateline Resources Ltd. (DTREF), Brookmount Gold Ltd. (BMXI), and American Lithium Minerals, Inc. (AMLM) – as undervalued leverage plays poised for significant upside. The piece emphasizes that increasing investor "FOMO" (fear of missing out) is accelerating interest in these smaller, under-the-radar companies as the precious metals rally gains momentum.
